title: Sugar's Power Threatens Everyone
description: Pages 6–10 focus on sugar's power threatens everyone, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as sugar, Trebol, Usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta collide in the tower as the rescue plan begins to fail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know how much you want it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But I won't let you have it, "straw- hat"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uihaha!! I'll end this by shooting you down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why you gotta go and stand behind me!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you're going to take the attack, Lucy!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy's lost his chance to escape!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hurry, we need to get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Burgess' armor has been smashed to pieces!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: D....!! DAT'S....!! DAT'S MY GREAT SENPA! FOR YA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: His fighting style is DIF- Ferent... is this guy really strawhat!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: The toys keep marching out, one after the other!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: That's all the proof we need in order to know...

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: ...that sugar is inside the officers' tower!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: In the very center is the lift that the officers use.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: As for the pipes stretch- ing all around it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...Big humans and broken toys drop down thru- ugh those.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: There are entrances to the scrap heap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: If you fall down one of those, you end up in the scrap heap...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: first the mountain of garbage, and now this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: It's not like I had any terrible injuries...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: ...So I thought it strange that they brought me to the medical room!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: The reason why toys emerge from here in droves...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Is the reason why this facto- Ry-like Room has another name besides "The Officers' Tower"...!!

summary: Sugar's Power Threatens Everyone focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sugar, Trebol, Usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta collide in the tower as the rescue plan begins to fail.
